## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `sudo venv/bin/python3 main.py ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: (e.g., Kali Linux 2026.1)
- Python: (e.g., 3.12)
- Interface: (e.g., eth0, wlan0)

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or terminal output.
